ledger_summary.summary_boundary: Bounded ledger counts and reviewer navigation only.

proof_chain.visual: platform ledger -> platform state manifest -> proof public summary -> proof bundle -> badge/status checks -> render-only downstream surfaces

stages.what_it_proves: A platform ledger seed bridge exists for the 4 events / 4 cases count spine.
stages.what_it_does_not_prove: Runtime, signal, public proof, deployment, disposition, and closure claims remain blocked.
stages.current_status: tracked platform seed bridge; ledger remains NOT_PUBLIC_SAFE

stages.what_it_proves: A pinned source manifest records the ledger count state, repo anchors, and proof boundary inputs.
stages.what_it_does_not_prove: A manifest is source truth only and does not establish runtime, signal, public-safe, or closure authority.

stages.what_it_proves: The proof repo owns a bounded public summary for 4 events / 4 cases, zero public-safe cases, and zero closed cases.
stages.what_it_does_not_prove: The summary is not runtime evidence and does not approve public proof or case disposition.

stages.what_it_proves: The proof repo packages the summary, pinned manifest reference, verifier commands, reviewer steps, and exclusions.
stages.what_it_does_not_prove: The bundle is not a release, tag, live evidence export, or public-safe promotion.
stages.current_status: reviewer packet source only; no release authority

stages.artifact_path: README.md and Governance Gate workflow status
stages.what_it_proves: Badge routes expose workflow status for the ledger summary and proof bundle verifier jobs.
stages.what_it_does_not_prove: Badges are status-only and cannot authorize proof, publication, deployment, or disposition claims.
stages.current_status: badge/status references only; not proof authority

stages.artifact_path: website render routes and GitHub reviewer routing
stages.what_it_proves: Downstream surfaces can route reviewers to proof-owned artifacts when separately reviewed.
stages.what_it_does_not_prove: Render-only and routing surfaces are not proof authority and cannot raise claim ceilings.
stages.current_status: render-only or operating-control route; not proof authority

trust_backup_checklist.evidence: Summary verifier exists at scripts/verify-lifetime-ledger-public-summary.py and the summary records 4 events / 4 cases.
Bundle verifier exists at scripts/verify-lifetime-ledger-proof-bundle.py and checks the proof bundle against the pinned platform manifest.
Badge verifier exists at scripts/verify-lifetime-ledger-badges.py; badges remain status-only indicators.
Evidence map and branch cleanup map exist under proof/indexes/ and are verifier-backed.
Branch cleanup map is classification-only; branch_deletion_performed remains false.
Blocked claims are explicitly listed in this reviewer proof map.
Website/render surfaces are render-only and not proof authority.
Project #1 is operating control only and not proof authority.

reviewer_click_path.label: Start with this map
reviewer_click_path.reviewer_value: Read the proof chain, artifact map, blocked claims, and verifier command from one proof-owned reviewer surface.

reviewer_click_path.label: Check the ledger summary
reviewer_click_path.reviewer_value: Confirm the 4 events / 4 cases count spine, NOT_PUBLIC_SAFE boundary, and SCHEMA_CONTRACT_VERIFIER_EXISTS_ONLY ceiling.

reviewer_click_path.label: Check the proof bundle
reviewer_click_path.reviewer_value: Confirm the summary, corrected platform manifest path, verifier commands, reviewer steps, and excluded material.

reviewer_click_path.label: Run the verifier
reviewer_click_path.reviewer_value: Run the deterministic verifier against the proof map and read-only sibling authority roots.

reviewer_click_path.label: Review blocked claims
reviewer_click_path.reviewer_value: Confirm runtime, signal, public-safe, production, disposition, case closure, website-authority, badge-authority, and Project #1 authority claims remain blocked.

blocked_claims.reason: This map does not prove runtime-active public proof; runtime authority requires separate approved evidence.
This map does not prove signal-observed public proof; signal truth requires separate approved evidence.
This map does not prove public-safe runtime proof; ledger status remains NOT_PUBLIC_SAFE.
This map does not prove production deployment.
This map does not prove SOCaaS deployment.
This map does not prove autonomous SOC authority.
This map does not prove AI-approved disposition.
This map does not prove analyst-approved disposition.
This map does not prove case closure; closed_case_count remains 0.
This map does not prove Cribl-routed telemetry or public proof.
This map does not prove Wazuh-routed telemetry or public proof.
This map does not prove AWS-live runtime state.
This map does not prove fleet-wide coverage.
This map does not prove live Splunk firing.
Website/render surfaces are not proof authority.
Badges are status-only and not proof authority.
Project #1 is operating control only and not proof authority.
